case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CAFIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $82,656.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY CLAIMANT MALALAN, DAVOR
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT AS TO WENDY HSIEH AND STEVE KIM ONLY FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CAFIFORNIA HSIEH, WENDY KIM, STEVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $12,695.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NTC OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FOREFITURE PROCEEDINGS INTERESTED PARTY STEVE KIM FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CAFIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO DAVOR MALALAN ONLY. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $35,000.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY SCOTT SUGARMAN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT DAVOR MALALAN. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $47,656.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
